title: micromeria cristata subsp. cristata
intro: Micromeria cristata subsp. cristata, commonly known as Rock Thyme, is a low-growing, woody-stemmed shrub native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help soothe digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Rock Thyme include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Rock Thyme can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
